summary:
The Klenow fragment lacks the activities of both 3'-5' and 5'-3' exonucleases as well as either type of DNA polymerase because these functions are associated with its missing domains compared to full-length DNA Pol I. \boxed{A}

The summary focuses only on the critical aspects related to enzyme activities present or absent in the Klenow fragment for clarity directly addressing what specific enzymatic function(s) were removed from this variant relative to wild-type DNA polI enzymes. This aligns closely while condensing into two succinct statements required by your instruction format.
